creator: tagattie@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I reviewed the patch and would like to make some change request per Python Ports Policy[1].

Could you make the following changes?
- Add python to CATEGORIES
- Use PKGNAMEPREFIX

[1] https://wiki.freebsd.org/Python/PortsPolicy

I will do:
svn mv print/frescobaldi print/py-frescobaldi

After that, I will apply the patch and test builds.
